name: Work Grill fork + work-tracking partition → 0.3.0

dates.duration_note: 2026-06-07 → 2026-06-08 (single working session across the date boundary). Final: 9 shipped / 0 in_progress / 1 not_shipped (S2-10/EXEC-011 deferred to backlog, never started). 14 issues closed_in_sprint 2 (the 9 worked sprint-2 slice issues + the 5 cascade deviations EXEC-024/026/027/028/029). ADR-0003 (Lifecycle skills fork) + ADR-0004 (chartered carve-out) recorded; to-execution@0.3.0 published. Retro Loop landed the chartered-vs-emergent wording refinement across principles.md + PROCESS.md + process-adherence.md (src+root), both gates PASS.

team.name: team-lead
team.owns: arbitration, src/template content, one-off authoring, final approval

team.name: scribe
team.owns: sprint/issue JSON, CONTEXT.md terms, the Retro Loop

goal: Fork the three Lifecycle skills into .excn-native execution-* skills and partition work-tracking per PRD-004, shipping both as to-execution@0.3.0.

shipped.title: Implement execution-grill-with-docs skill
shipped.summary: .excn-native Work Grill skill: explicit-path discovery, single context (no root CONTEXT.md/CONTEXT-MAP), ADRs to .excn/adr/, mid-grill philosophy candidates route through PRD notes→retro (never a direct PHILOSOPHY.md write), inline glossary writes by the grilling session; 3 files, alignment PASS; src+root mirrored.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07 by team-lead. alignment PASS 0 violations on the three-skill set (.excn/prd-005_progress.json); src→root byte-identical; stamp manifest covered by package-qa under EXEC-030. Cascade-closes the subsumed catalog deviations EXEC-024, EXEC-026, EXEC-027, EXEC-028, EXEC-029 (their resolutions ship inside this skill).

shipped.title: Adopt glossary format into the CONTEXT.md seed
shipped.summary: Glossary format adopted: src/template seed reformatted to the Language format (### Term + _Avoid_, Relationships / Example dialogue / Flagged ambiguities, roster) and the root live .excn/CONTEXT.md adopted to match — 17 terms preserved, 12 _Avoid_ lines, 3 doc-level sections, adopt-forward (bulk per-term restructure deferred by recorded decision); seed + root both alignment PASS.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07. Seed half (team-lead) + root half (scribe) both alignment PASS (.excn/prd-005_progress.json). Bulk per-term restructure deferred — see sprint decision 'Glossary-format adoption'.

shipped.title: Implement execution-to-prd skill
shipped.summary: Fork publishes schema-valid JSON PRDs to .excn/prds/PRD-<NNN>-<slug>.json; prd.schema.json is the sole format authority (no markdown template); no labels/tracker/triage; synthesizes from grill context, no interview; philosophy candidates routed via notes; alignment PASS; src+root mirrored.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07 by team-lead. alignment PASS 0 violations (.excn/prd-005_progress.json); src→root byte-identical.

shipped.title: Implement execution-to-issues skill
shipped.summary: Fork appends schema-valid issues to .excn/issues/backlog.json (the partition target); issue.schema.json is the sole authority (no markdown body template); globally-unique id scan across all partition files; HITL user-quiz preserved; dependency-ordered; forward-links the source PRD; invocable standalone; alignment PASS; src+root mirrored.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07 by team-lead. alignment PASS 0 violations (.excn/prd-005_progress.json); src→root byte-identical; targets backlog.json per the EXEC-030 partition contract.

shipped.title: Preflight required-skill list + Scaffolder manifest
shipped.summary: Lifecycle made self-contained: Setup Skill Preflight drops the three forked skills from required globals (keeps make-teammate, async-questions) and notes the Scaffolder stamps them; Setup Grill + Handoff + README + both PROCESS.md + principles.md reference the execution-* forks (principles genericized to 'a grill'); src/SKILL.md sole-copy, no mirror; alignment PASS.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07 by team-lead. alignment PASS 0 violations (with the EXEC-025 seed; .excn/prd-005_progress.json). src/SKILL.md sole-copy (no mirror).

shipped.title: Partition schemas + template skeleton
shipped.summary: Partition schemas + template skeleton: issue/sprint schemas carry the partition contract (backlog.json + sprint-<N>/sprint-<N>-issues.json, one shape, globally-unique ids, cross-file depends_on); template stamps empty backlog.json; .gitkeep removed; src+root mirrored; package-qa PASS.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07 by team-lead. package-qa PASS 0 violations (manifest match, pack parity, stamped backlog gitignored in host, host root .gitignore untouched); evidence in .excn/prd-004_progress.json (step package_qa_pass). Unblocks EXEC-031 (S2-7).

shipped.title: Cross-file validators + path-contract sweep
shipped.summary: scribe's half: scribe.md (+ src/template mirror) gains partition ownership and the cross-file validation discipline — owns backlog.json + each sprint's companion sprint-<N>/sprint-<N>-issues.json, moves issues across files at sprint boundaries, validates cross-file (globally-unique ids, depends_on across partitions) after every move. PROCESS.md §Sprint tracking + process-adherence.md companion-file read are team-lead's half. PRD-004.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07. Landed mid-sprint as a chartered slice per ADR-0004. alignment PASS 0 violations over the full partition doc set (PROCESS.md + scribe.md + process-adherence.md, three src↔root pairs byte-identical) — verdict in .excn/prd-004_progress.json (step alignment_review_pass). PROCESS.md/process-adherence.md half authored by team-lead. Validation discipline also recorded operative-now in prd-004_progress.json for EXEC-032.

shipped.title: Live root-Instance migration to partitions
shipped.summary: Live root-Instance migration: issues.json(33) split atomically into backlog.json(2: EXEC-002/017) + sprint-1(16) + sprint-2(15) by each sprint's issues_addressed; old file removed; 33 reconciles, ids unique, 0 dangling depends_on, all partitions schema-valid.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07. Functional reconciliation is the gate (ephemeral work-tracking data, no alignment gate per team-lead). Team-lead spot-checked the partitions on disk: all green. Evidence in .excn/prd-004_progress.json (step exec_032_migration_applied).

shipped.title: Publish to-execution@0.3.0
shipped.summary: to-execution@0.3.0 published to the public npm registry (Work Grill fork PRD-005 + work-tracking partition PRD-004 together) behind the EXEC-015 identity guards; registry npx-vs-local byte-diff IDENTICAL (27/27 stamped files); package-qa PASS from the tarball.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07 by packager. registry 0.3.0 (dist-tag latest 0.3.0); shasum 2a2d5194f8cce193c34e459cfd1e47cb6c0c44c0; integrity sha512-h8mvGgQy6RZWv04yMjTkpdwmnVVBkq4Uvb8cfILn25IrAhRHq0in5vPFNkt3YkK64E6V6pJ4LFccRZ65IphRyw==; 31 files, 21.4 kB packed / 64.6 kB unpacked. Release commit 821cc06, tag v0.3.0 (origin), content commit 7ce56ea. Gates: package-qa PASS (0 violations, from tarball); prepublishOnly 6 identity guards held; registry-tarball shasum matched published.

not_shipped.title: Zero-glue Work Grill end-to-end on a scratch 0.3.0 Instance
not_shipped.summary: Run the full Work Grill (grill -> PRD -> issues) on a scratch 0.3.0 Instance; every artifact lands conformant to schema with zero translation language. PRD-005's acceptance test. Depends on EXEC-033.
not_shipped.notes: HITL — the grill requires the user.

decisions.title: Chartered carve-out for mid-sprint definition changes (ADR-0004)
decisions.summary: Brooks ruled, recorded as ADR-0004: a definition change that is a chartered deliverable (PRD→issue→sprint slice, alignment-gated, Team-Lead-approved) lands mid-sprint as its slice; the Retro Loop remains the sole path for retro-emergent changes. The carve-out's test is chartered-vs-ad-hoc, not which file — so scribe.md (a Teammate constitution) lands under it just like PROCESS.md/process-adherence.md. Matches sprint-1 EXEC-003. The alignment agent independently concurred. At sprint-2 close, the close-time process-adherence run is given ADR-0004 as governing context so the chartered mid-sprint def changes read as conformant.

decisions.title: Glossary-format adoption: doc-level adopted, bulk per-term restructure deferred (EXEC-025)
decisions.summary: Root .excn/CONTEXT.md adopted the seed's Language format at the doc level — 3 net-new sections (Relationships, Example dialogue, Flagged ambiguities) + _Avoid_ lines on 12 high-signal terms — with all 17 mature ### Term entries preserved verbatim. Bulk per-term restructuring (forcing _Avoid_/sub-sections on every term) was deferred as adopt-forward: new grilled terms get the full format; mature prose entries keep their form. Precise-Minimalism call; seed + root both alignment PASS.

retrospective_notes.title: Chartered-vs-emergent change-path wants explicit wording in the governance docs
retrospective_notes.body: ADR-0004 charters a definition change that is a PRD→issue→sprint slice (alignment-gated, TL-approved) to land mid-sprint as its slice, reserving the Retro Loop for retro-emergent changes. principles.md ('Retro-loop-as-sole-change-path'), PROCESS.md §Retro Loop, and process-adherence.md's Retro-Loop check ('came through the Retro Loop') still state the Retro Loop as the sole path without naming the chartered-vs-emergent distinction. Refining that wording across all three is itself retro-emergent, so it rides this sprint's Retro Loop at close.

retrospective_notes.title: Change-path ambiguity surfaced as a blocker before any edit
retrospective_notes.body: scribe halted EXEC-031 on recognizing its deliverables land in Retro-Loop-guarded docs and escalated rather than editing through the ambiguity; that escalation is what prompted the carve-out ruling recorded as ADR-0004.
